code_prompt_defaults.surface_path_object_description: a cylinder side shown with its rectangular unwrapped net and a marked path
code_prompt_defaults.surface_path_annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object with exactly these keys: "marked_surface_path", "circumference_dimension", and "height_dimension"; each value must be the pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around that visible path or dimension annotation
code_prompt_defaults.surface_path_answer_hint: set "answer" to the marked path length as an integer
code_prompt_defaults.wrapped_mark_object_description: an unwrapped cylinder strip with one marked position and a top-view rim with labeled candidate positions
code_prompt_defaults.wrapped_mark_annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object with exactly these keys: "source_strip_mark" and "matching_rim_candidate"; each value must be the pixel point [x,y] at the visible mark or candidate center
code_prompt_defaults.wrapped_mark_answer_hint: set "answer" to the matching candidate label as a capital letter

surface_path_length_value_query: What is the length of the marked path on the unwrapped cylinder side?
Use the unwrapped net to compute the marked path length.
Find the marked path length from the rectangular cylinder-side net.
What length does the marked diagonal path represent on the cylinder side?
Compute the length of the marked path shown on the cylinder net.
wrapped_mark_position_label_query: Which labeled rim position matches the marked position on the unwrapped strip?
Find the rim label that corresponds to the marked position on the strip.
When the strip wraps around the cylinder, which labeled point does the mark align with?
Match the strip mark to the labeled top-view rim position.
Which candidate label shows where the marked strip position lands on the rim?
